pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven property for Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to target Java 21 and enable preview features.
Update maven-surefire-plugin to pass --enable-preview flag to the JVM for running tests with preview features.
Add explicit dependency for JUnit Jupiter API for testing.
Add explicit dependency for JUnit Jupiter Engine for running tests.
Add Caffeine library for caching functionality.
Add Spring Boot starter for WebSocket support.
Add Spring Boot starter for Thymeleaf templating engine.
Add Hibernate Validator for bean validation.
Add Jakarta Validation API for bean validation interfaces.
Update Lombok dependency to a specific newer version and set scope to provided.
Update PostgreSQL JDBC driver to a newer version compatible with the new environment.
Add explicit dependency for Logback classic logging implementation.
Add explicit dependency for SLF4J API logging facade.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT.
Bump the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.
Explicitly set the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.10.1.
Remove Lombok annotation processor paths from compiler plugin and exclude from boot plugin, relying on standard provided scope.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Replace hardcoded database host with an environment variable to support containerized or cloud deployments.
Replace hardcoded database port with an environment variable to allow flexible connection configurations.
Replace hardcoded database name with an environment variable to enable dynamic database targeting.
Replace hardcoded database username with an environment variable for security and flexibility.
Replace hardcoded database password with an environment variable to avoid storing secrets in configuration files.
Explicitly configure the HikariCP driver class name to ensure correct connection pool initialization.
Explicitly set the Hibernate dialect to PostgreSQL to ensure correct SQL generation.
Enable the Open Session in View pattern to allow lazy loading in views, often required for legacy compatibility or specific ORM behaviors.
Explicitly disable Spring Cache to prevent unexpected caching behavior during development or testing.
Set Spring Security logging to DEBUG to aid in troubleshooting authentication and authorization issues.
Set root logging level to DEBUG to increase overall application verbosity for development purposes.
